name: Priya
manager_notes: Priya shipped a major feature on Monday and the team noticed, but she has been quieter this week. I want to check whether this is normal post-launch recovery or something unresolved. She also mentioned wanting to mentor a few months ago and that thread never moved. I need a clearer read on what she expects to own next quarter before I introduce the billing rewrite, since she may already be forming plans that this will disrupt.
answers: Launch went well, but feels flatter this week than expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
Proud of the migration plan and how the cutover was handled.
Mentioned mentoring before — still wants it, but stopped pushing.
Unsure what she's owning next quarter, and that makes her uneasy.
Felt a bit stuck doing similar work for months.
Wants the bigger scope conversation sooner rather than later.
A clear next-step path would help her reset her energy.
Wants to start by getting clarity on next-quarter ownership before the billing rewrite lands on her.
